overall.description: A slow panoramic view of a rustic wooden cabin interior featuring a stone fireplace with burning logs, exposed wooden beams, and traditional furniture. The scene is rendered in a game engine with cinematic lighting that blends warm firelight, cool window light, and interior chandeliers.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cabin living room with central fireplace

agents.ego_description: stationary observation slowly panning left across the room, focusing on the fireplace and central living area

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning logs and animated flames, dominating the right side of the frame
wooden staircase with simple railings leading to an upper level against the back wall
small window with blue-tinted glass emitting cool exterior light
circular red patterned rug on the wooden floor in the center of the room
simple wooden bench or seating near the window
iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a cozy cabin interior with a stone fireplace burning brightly on the right. The camera slowly pans left, revealing a wooden staircase in the background, a patterned rug on the floor, and a bench near a window emitting cool blue light. The warm firelight contrasts with the cooler window illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cabin living room revealing bar area

events.description: as the camera pans left, the warm fireplace light shifts to the right periphery while the cooler left side of the room becomes more prominent

agents.ego_description: continuing the leftward pan to reveal the previously unseen left side of the room including a wooden bar counter

entered.detail: tall wooden cabinet or bar counter with shelves on the left side of the room
wall-mounted iron torch or light fixture on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The pan continues leftward, revealing a wooden bar counter and wall sconce on the left side of the cabin. The fireplace moves to the right edge of the frame while the staircase and window shift toward the right background. The lighting balance shifts as the direct firelight moves to the periphery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous pan across a rustic cabin interior that shifts from the warm glow of a hearth to the detailed furnishings of a living area. It begins focused on a brightly burning stone fireplace on the right, where warm firelight contrasts with the cool blue illumination streaming from a nearby window. As the camera glides leftward, the view expands to reveal a patterned rug and a wooden staircase receding into the background. The scene then shifts further to uncover a wooden bar counter and a wall sconce on the left, while the fireplace and window gradually move toward the periphery of the frame. Finally, the lighting balance evolves as the direct heat of the fire gives way to the ambient interior light of the cabin's wider layout.
